features.name: concatenation of signed signal in unsigned port connection
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of a signed signal used in an unsigned port connection context, where the concatenation result should be treated as unsigned

features.name: dollar_unsigned cast on signed signal in port connection
features.description: Code should include a $unsigned() cast applied to a signed signal in a port connection, where the cast result should be treated as unsigned

features.name: unsigned_cast on signed signal in port connection
features.description: Code should include an unsigned'() cast applied to a signed signal in a port connection, where the cast result should be treated as unsigned

features.name: part select of signed signal in port connection
features.description: Code should include a part select of a signed signal used in a port connection, where the part select should be treated as unsigned
